code: export class InventoryMessageParser{constructor(){this._items=[];}flush(){this._items=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;const count=wrapper.readInt();this._items=[];for(let i=0;i<count;i++){this._items.push({id:wrapper.readInt(),itemId:wrapper.readInt(),userId:wrapper.readInt(),slot:wrapper.readInt(),quantity:wrapper.readInt(),durability:wrapper.readInt(),iconPath:wrapper.readString(),itemType:wrapper.readString(),rarity:wrapper.readString()});}return true;}get items(){return this._items;}}
